# title

**Instance Property**

The title attribute of the element.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String { get }
```

## Value

- **value**: The raw value attribute of the element.
- **placeholderValue**: The value displayed when the element has no value.
- **label**: The label attribute of the element.
